official_sources.authority_note: Official binary source for set_display_objective clear-slot body encoding.
Official binary source for the Play clientbound packet table and set_display_objective packet id.

field_notes.scope: Clear display slot fixture only: DisplaySlot.LIST with null Objective.

stop_boundary: Proves Play clientbound set_display_objective packet framing and dispatch/decode for a clear-slot fixture only; does not infer scoreboard Objective state.
